narrative:
Twinsburg 5-B (precinct in Summit County) has 896 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 42.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 30.4 percentage points.
